description: Schema documentation for JaffaAI signal publishing

structure.top_category: Most common category in today's signals

title.example: Fortnite Chapter 6 Season 3 Drops with Full Physics Overhaul

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary. Facts only. 120-160 chars ideal.
summary.example: Epic's new season introduces UE 5.5 physics across all platforms. 30M concurrent at launch.

why_it_matters.description: 1 sentence interpretation. Not summary — insight. What does this MEAN for the industry?
why_it_matters.example: Epic is using Fortnite as a live UE 5.5 demo, which impacts every Unreal studio.

confidence.description: confirmed = official source. rumor = multiple credible reports. leak = single unverified source.

score.description: Overall impact score. 10 = industry-shaking. 7-9 = major. 4-6 = notable. 1-3 = minor.

properties.player: 1-10 — how much does this affect gamers?
properties.dev: 1-10 — how much does this affect developers/studios?
properties.esports: 1-10 — how much does this affect competitive/esports?
properties.industry: 1-10 — how much does this affect the business/market?

tags.description: Short tags for categorisation. Game names, companies, topics.

detail.description: Array of paragraphs for the full story. 2-4 paragraphs ideal.

sources.description: Array of source objects with name and URL

publishing_api.body: JSON with date and signals array
publishing_api.response: JSON with success status and signal count

scoring_guidelines.10: Once-a-year industry event. New console launch. Major acquisition. GTA-level release.
scoring_guidelines.9: Major game launch. Platform policy change. Record-breaking event.
scoring_guidelines.8: Significant update to top-10 game. Major studio announcement. Big esports moment.
scoring_guidelines.7: Notable game update. Important industry move. Trending topic.
scoring_guidelines.6: Interesting development. Worth knowing. Above average impact.
scoring_guidelines.5: Standard news. Normal patch. Routine announcement.
scoring_guidelines.4: Minor but notable. Niche audience impact.
scoring_guidelines.3: Small update. Limited impact. Specialist interest.
scoring_guidelines.1: Barely notable. Included only for completeness.
